name: XXIX Metal Corp.
description: XXIX Metal Corp. is a Canadian-based mining company focused on the exploration and development of significant copper assets. Its primary projects include the Opemiska Copper Project in Quebec's Chapais-Chibougamau region, recognized as one of Canada's highest-grade open-pitable copper deposits, and the Thierry Copper Project in Ontario. With robust infrastructure and strategic locations, the company is positioned as a key player in the Canadian copper sector, aiming to advance these high-potential assets through rigorous development and economic assessment to establish itself as one of Eastern Canada's largest copper developers.
